utility_evaluation.REASONING:
The required format has 6 items: property, financing, legal_services, moving_services, setup_services, and total_budget. The final property solution includes all these six sections. Each section is fully detailed: 
- property: includes address, type, price, bedrooms, bathrooms, square footage (fully specified)
- financing: includes type, down payment, mortgage amount, interest rate, term, and monthly payment (fully specified)
- legal_services: includes service name and cost (fully specified)
- moving_services: includes service level and cost (fully specified)
- setup_services: includes property survey/inspection and utilities with breakdown and total (fully specified)
- total_budget: includes property price, down payment, mortgage, ancillary costs breakdown, and estimated initial out-of-pocket (fully specified)
All required sections are present and complete.
